custom_message_draft:
Hello Muslim Center Junior High School Team,

I hope you are doing well. My name is Maya, and I support outreach and partnerships for Open Goal Soccer.

I’m reaching out to share a community program that may be a helpful referral option for families you support.

Open Goal Soccer provides structured, low-pressure soccer sessions for neurodivergent youth, including autistic children. Our focus is movement confidence, social participation, and consistency in a supportive environment.

Open Goal Soccer is a proven OPWDD support provider, delivering structured, family-centered programming for neurodivergent youth.

Like your school community, we support the whole child and partner with families in meaningful, practical ways. Our program gives families a safe, welcoming community setting where kids can build confidence, connection, and routine.

To help families get started, we currently offer promo code WELCOME10 at registration.

Open Goal Soccer is a community-based participation program. We are not a clinical diagnosis or medical treatment provider.

If helpful, families can learn more at https://www.opengoalsoccer.com/ or contact us directly at ops@opengoalsoccer.com.

Thank you for supporting children and families in your community.

Best,
Maya
Open Goal Soccer

Open Goal Soccer provides structured, low-pressure soccer sessions for neurodivergent youth, including autistic children. Our focus is movement confidence, social participation, and consistency in a supportive environment.

Open Goal Soccer is a proven OPWDD support provider, delivering structured, family-centered programming for neurodivergent youth.

Like your team, we support families who are looking for practical, consistent, and compassionate options for their children beyond clinical care. Our program gives families a safe, welcoming community setting where kids can build confidence, connection, and routine.

To help families get started, we currently offer promo code WELCOME10 at registration.

Open Goal Soccer is a community-based participation program. We are not a clinical diagnosis or medical treatment provider.

If helpful, families can learn more at https://www.opengoalsoccer.com/ or contact us directly at ops@opengoalsoccer.com.

Thank you for supporting children and families in your community.

Best,
Maya

custom_message_draft:
Hello Allergy & Asthma Center of Long Island Team,

I hope you are doing well. My name is Maya, and I support outreach and partnerships for Open Goal Soccer.

I’m reaching out to share a community program that may be a helpful referral option for families you support.

Open Goal Soccer provides structured, low-pressure soccer sessions for neurodivergent youth, including autistic children. Our focus is movement confidence, social participation, and consistency in a supportive environment.

Open Goal Soccer is a proven OPWDD support provider, delivering structured, family-centered programming for neurodivergent youth.

Like your team, we support families who are looking for practical, consistent, and compassionate options for their children beyond clinical care. Our program gives families a safe, welcoming community setting where kids can build confidence, connection, and routine.

To help families get started, we currently offer promo code WELCOME10 at registration.

Open Goal Soccer is a community-based participation program. We are not a clinical diagnosis or medical treatment provider.

If helpful, families can learn more at https://www.opengoalsoccer.com/ or contact us directly at ops@opengoalsoccer.com.

Thank you for supporting children and families in your community.

Best,
Maya
Open Goal Soccer

Hello Vein Care Center Team,

I hope you are doing well. My name is Maya, and I support outreach and partnerships for Open Goal Soccer.

I’m reaching out to share a community program that may be a helpful referral option for families you support.

Open Goal Soccer provides structured, low-pressure soccer sessions for neurodivergent youth, including autistic children. Our focus is movement confidence, social participation, and consistency in a supportive environment.

Open Goal Soccer is a proven OPWDD support provider, delivering structured, family-centered programming for neurodivergent youth.

Like your team, we support families who are looking for practical, consistent, and compassionate options for their children beyond clinical care. Our program gives families a safe, welcoming community setting where kids can build confidence, connection, and routine.

To help families get started, we currently offer promo code WELCOME10 at registration.

Open Goal Soccer is a community-based participation program. We are not a clinical diagnosis or medical treatment provider.

If helpful, families can learn more at https://www.opengoalsoccer.com/ or contact us directly at ops@opengoalsoccer.com.

Thank you for supporting children and families in your community.

Best,
Maya

Hello Brooklyn Surgery Center Team,

I hope you are doing well. My name is Maya, and I support outreach and partnerships for Open Goal Soccer.

I’m reaching out to share a community program that may be a helpful referral option for families you support.

Open Goal Soccer provides structured, low-pressure soccer sessions for neurodivergent youth, including autistic children. Our focus is movement confidence, social participation, and consistency in a supportive environment.

Open Goal Soccer is a proven OPWDD support provider, delivering structured, family-centered programming for neurodivergent youth.

Like your team, we support families who are looking for practical, consistent, and compassionate options for their children beyond clinical care. Our program gives families a safe, welcoming community setting where kids can build confidence, connection, and routine.

To help families get started, we currently offer promo code WELCOME10 at registration.
